title: Zynd's Infection Mod: The Spread
description: It devours. It grows. It transforms. It spreads.
body:
The Spread is a mod focused on the titular macrovirus, The Spread. This mod was made in MCreator as my first ever project in mod-making, and was designed to add more challenge to Minecraft. 

Any block of Spread, be it the creep, bloom, or tumors, can infect your Minecraft world and grow out of control quickly, devouring everything in its wake; zombies transform into hulking multi-ocular beasts, pillars of spreadbloom scrape at the sky, as the Spread grows on its own bones to spread further and further. Enjoy your homegrown apocalypse~

Currently (3/31/2025) the mod isn't fully where I want it, so updates on the way eventually (tm). I do plan on focusing on other projects first. Currently I've spent about four or five months working on this mod and learning MCreator. There is no custom code, only code blocks. How'd I do? ;)

Me? I'm Zynd Legion, and I stream on twitch at Twitch.tv/ZyndLegion as a vtuber demon of intrusive thoughts, so feel free and come by and chill. Depending on the stream, I probably won't have the ability to talk about the mod, so don't expect that unless it's a pretty slow stream, but I'd still love to see you. Thanks!
